meta.title: Portfolio - Sebastian Cachis
meta.description: Junior Full Stack Developer with 4+ years across fintech and e-commerce. I design and build financial platforms end-to-end with Java 17/21, Spring Boot 3, and Next.js 16.

hero.name: Sebastian Cachis
hero.tagline: I design and build reliable platforms end-to-end, from domain architecture to the frontend.
hero.metric: Investment platforms in production · 4+ years across fintech and e-commerce

about.heading: From Java support in e-commerce to designing financial platforms end-to-end.
body: Full Stack Developer with 4+ years across e-commerce and financial services. I work on features end-to-end with Java 17/21, Spring Boot, and Next.js, applying DDD, CQRS, and hexagonal architecture on modular monoliths built to scale.

Today I take part in the architectural design and development of portfolio management platforms in financial services, alongside internal automation tools. What drives me is the balance between long-term technical decisions and delivery that brings real value to the business.
Software Engineering student at UPC (graduating 2026). C1 English. Based in Lima, Peru.

experience.intro: 4+ years across e-commerce and financial services — from Java 8 API optimization to designing DDD/CQRS hexagonal architectures in production.
